zh.Tillington, Sussex, England, United King: 英國英格蘭素可提林頓

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne於大約1373年出生在英國素可提林頓時，他的父親John de Milbourne II24歲，母親Isolt De Beauchamp19歲。他於1403年與Elizabeth de Eylesford在英國賀福爾提林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年10月2日在英國英格蘭賀福爾提林頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne于大约1373年出生在英国素可提林頓时，他的父亲John de Milbourne II24岁，母亲Isolt De Beauchamp19岁。他于1403年与Elizabeth de Eylesford在英国賀福爾提林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1419年10月2日在英国英格兰賀福爾提林頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Milbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Milburn
meanings: English (Northumberland, Cumberland and Durham): habitational name from any of the places in Westmorland, Northumberland, Somerset, Dorset or Wiltshire, all derived from Old English myln ‘mill’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. There has been some confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne was born about 1373, in Tillington, Sussex, England, his father, John de Milbourne II, was 24 and his mother, Isolt De Beauchamp, was 19. He married Elizabeth de Eylesford in 1403, in Tillington, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 2 October 1419, in Tillington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne est né environ 1373, à Tillington, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John de Milbourne II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isolt De Beauchamp, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth d’Eylesford en 1403, à Tillington, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 1419, à Tillington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne um 1373 in Tillington, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Milbourne II 24 und seine Mutter Isolt De Beauchamp 19. Er hat 1403 in Tillington, Herefordshire, England Elizabeth de Eylesford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Oktober 1419 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Tillington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne è nato il circa 1373 nel Tillington, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John de Milbourne II, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isolt De Beauchamp, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Eylesford nel 1403, nel Tillington, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 ottobre 1419, nel Tillington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Peter de Milbourneが約1373年にイギリススセックスティリントンで生まれた時，父John de Milbourne IIは24歳，母Isolt De Beauchampは19歳であった。1403年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアティリントンでElizabeth de Eylesfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年10月2日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアティリントンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne(이)가 대략 1373년 영국 수세스 틸링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Milbourne II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolt De Beauchamp(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1403년 영국 허퍼드실르 틸링턴에서 Elizabeth de Eylesford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 10월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 틸링턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne nasceu aproximadamente 1373, em Tillington, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Milbourne II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isolt De Beauchamp, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Eylesford em 1403, em Tillington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1419, em Tillington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne родился около 1373 г. в местности тиллингтон, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Milbourne II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isolt De Beauchamp, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Eylesford в 1403 г. в местности тиллингтон, хирефордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 октября 1419 г. в местности тиллингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne nació aproximadamente 1373, en Tillington, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Milbourne II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isolt De Beauchamp, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Eylesford en 1403, en Tillington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de octubre de 1419, en Tillington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
